steps.title: Identify the sequential pattern
steps.content: The passage uses “first” to mark the initial step and “Lastly” to mark the final step. The blank must contain the transition for the middle step.

steps.title: Match the sequential marker
steps.content: ”Next” signals the second step in a sequence—exactly what fits between “first” scraped and “Lastly” smoothed. The other three either introduce examples (A), draw similarities (C), or show contrast (D), none of which fit a procedural sequence. That matches choice B — B is correct.
